query:
INSERT INTO material_boards (supplierId, boardNumber, materialType, pricePerMeter, currency, minOrderQuantity, leadTime, description, status) 
VALUES ((SELECT id FROM material_suppliers WHERE code = 'TEST-SUP-001'), 'TEST-BOARD-001', '测试材质', 25.50, 'RMB', 100, 7, '这是一个测试布板', 'active');
